§ 01

Selected works

08 / projects
01

SAKURA Corporate
Lanyard Design

Identity, Product2024

Designed in accordance with client-specified elements and the corporate identity guidelines, the concept embraces simplicity with gradient expression, conveying the values of sustainability and infinite development.

SAKURA GROUP delivers human-centered service and deeper understanding of homes, creating unique living experiences and integrated solutions to realize the possibilities of a better, more inspiring home life.

02

Taiwanese Temple
Keychain Straps

Cultural, Textile2024

In Taiwan's temple festivals, fabric straps often symbolize group identity and serve as meaningful gifts for devotees — carrying blessings and belonging.

Incorporating client-specified elements, the design uses brushstroke lines, cloud motifs, and embroidery to blend tradition with modern aesthetics — creating a practical yet culturally significant strap.

03

UP-FUN Yoga
Resistance Band

Pattern, Product2024

Inspired by summer, this band integrates beaches, oceans, and blooming flowers. Vibrant colors and patterns capture the energy and joy of the season, turning exercise into a refreshing summer experience.

UP-FUN creates yoga products and lifestyle accessories that blend design and function — bold colors, modern style, fitness gear as everyday essentials.

04

Supreme Shield
Exquisite Coating

Brand, Poster2025

The interlaced "SS" symbol represents the strength of a protective shield. A gradient texture conveys the coating's refined thinness and glossy brilliance; the seal in the lower-left emphasizes certification and premium quality.

SS Exquisite Coating redefines automotive care as a premium experience — combining ultimate shield strength with exquisite brilliance.

05

Customized Marriage
Registration Design

Editorial, Print2024

In Taiwan, household-registration offices provide standardized marriage applications. Many couples, however, commission customized versions as meaningful keepsakes — legally valid designs that turn a routine procedure into a cherished memory, enriched with personal aesthetics.

06

CITY CAFÉ
Prepaid Coffee Card

Print, Packaging2024

A pay-in-advance, redeem-later card allowing customers to purchase multiple cups at once. Minimalist and stylish — the design highlights the brand image while elevating the customer's daily coffee ritual.

07

KANGOL Branding
Stickers

Illustration, Brand2024

Founded in 1938 in the United Kingdom, KANGOL is recognized worldwide for its kangaroo logo. This project draws from the brand's British heritage and signature emblem, transforming them into a playful series of 2D flat-style stickers.

08

Rainbow Ribbon
Website Design

Web, Art Direction2025

Tailor-made for a ribbon company — a warm, inviting atmosphere where ribbons blend into everyday life and festive occasions.

Simplicity as the foundation, enhanced with subtle decorative touches — unassuming yet capable of adding brilliance. It connects life with emotion, delivering beauty and blessings through every detail.

Let's make something together.
